installCommand: npm install && cd backend && npm install

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app)

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://bible.helloao.org https://bolls.life https://bible-api.com https://getbible.net https://www.googleapis.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://openrouter.ai; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
